data.name: HarvesterService
data.purpose: Manages the lifecycle of podcast episodes, including fetching artifacts, processing them into MP3 files, maintaining a history of episodes, purging old episodes, and rebuilding the podcast feed.

operations.name: loadHistory
operations.description: Loads the history of processed episodes from a JSON file.

scenarios.name: History file does not exist
scenarios.given: History file does not exist at HISTORY_PATH

operations.name: saveHistory
operations.description: Saves the history of processed episodes to a JSON file.

operations.name: convertToMp3
operations.description: Converts a WAV file to an MP3 file using FFmpeg.

scenarios.name: Conversion succeeds
scenarios.given: Valid WAV file path and MP3 file path
scenarios.then: MP3 file is created at the specified path

scenarios.name: Conversion fails
scenarios.given: Invalid WAV file path or MP3 file path

operations.name: fetchArtifacts
operations.description: Fetches a list of artifacts from the API.

scenarios.name: Artifacts fetched successfully
scenarios.given: API is reachable and returns a list of artifacts

operations.name: processArtifact
operations.description: Processes an artifact into an MP3 file and updates the history.

scenarios.name: Artifact processed successfully
scenarios.then: Artifact is processed into an MP3 file and history is updated

operations.name: purgeOldEpisodes
operations.description: Purges episodes older than RETENTION_DAYS from the history and filesystem.

scenarios.name: Old episodes purged successfully
scenarios.then: Old episodes are removed from history and filesystem

scenarios.name: No old episodes to purge
scenarios.given: History dictionary with no old episodes

operations.name: rebuildFeed
operations.description: Rebuilds the podcast feed XML file from the history of episodes.

scenarios.name: Feed rebuilt successfully
scenarios.then: Podcast feed XML file is updated

operations.name: runCycle
operations.description: Runs a complete cycle of fetching artifacts, processing them, purging old episodes, and rebuilding the feed.

scenarios.name: Cycle runs successfully
scenarios.then: Artifacts are fetched, processed, old episodes are purged, and feed is rebuilt

scenarios.name: Cycle fails
scenarios.given: Invalid history dictionary or API unreachable

operations.name: main
operations.description: Main entry point that loads history, runs a cycle, and saves history.

scenarios.name: Main runs successfully
scenarios.given: History file exists or can be created
scenarios.then: History is loaded, cycle is run, and history is saved

scenarios.name: Main fails
scenarios.given: History file cannot be loaded or saved

sideEffects: Executes FFmpeg subprocess for MP3 conversion
